title: HG Heavy Duty Tile & Grout Cleaner - Powerful Floor Cleaner for Kitchen, Bathroom & Stone Surfaces - 1L
features: HG floor Tile Cleaner Extra Strong: The concentrated cleaner is designed for powerful cleaning and removing problem dirt, wax, polish and other protective coatings from tiled floors and flagstones
Bathroom and kitchen floor cleaner: Kitchen, hallway, living room, toilet or bathroom tile cleaner and polish. Perfect for a professional deep clean and stain removal using a floor mop or machine
Natural stone safe: The tile floor cleaner is safe for use on all types of natural stone, as well as grouting. Removes stubborn grease and ingrained grime from slabs and non-calciferous stone
Take care of your floors: Regular cleaning of your tiled or flagstone floors with this multi-tasking cleaner will help accentuate the natural colour of your tiles, without damaging their structure
1 x HG Tile Cleaner X Strong, 1L. Discover the HG cleaning product range, from HG grout to LVT floor cleaners, limescale remover, mould remover, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description HG Tile Cleaner Extra Strong is a professional and ultra powerful concentrated floor cleaner liquid, ideal for removing stains, shoe marks, problem dirt or old wax, polish and other protective coatings from floor tiles, flagstones and all types of natural stone. The floor and tile cleaning solution works as a tough grease, dirt and stain remover, and is safe for use on natural stone flooring. This heavy duty tile cleaning solution can be used with a mop or machine. Restore the natural beauty of your stone slabs with this industrial strength floor cleaner and tile restorer. 1 litre cleans approx.35-70m². Includes: 1 x HG Tile Cleaner Extra Strong (1 litre) How to use: 1. Dissolve 0.5L in 5L lukewarm water. 2. Apply liberally. 3. Scrub the surface well with a stiff broom or scrubbing brush. 4. Leave it to work for a few minutes and scrub again. 5. Mop floor to remove liquid and rinse with water. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products, including HG limescale remover, mould remover, multi-purpose cleaners and all-surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Box Contains 1 x 1L
